description: This elderly couple left the judges terrified! 😱😱😱 #americangottalent #britainsgottalent #skinwalker #shapeshifter #fusion #agt #bgt #aigenerated #midjourneyaiart #usa_tiktok #AI #transformation
prompt_text: A high-stakes talent show stage features an elderly Asian couple under dramatic blue spotlights. The man wears a mustard-yellow shirt under a tan trench coat and dark trousers, while the woman is dressed in a light-blue dress and a matching blazer. As the video progresses, both individuals undergo a surreal transformation: the man turns into a large, majestic lion with a full mane, and the woman becomes a grey wolf. The setting is a professional stage with a blue-and-white geometric light pattern in the background. Interspersed throughout the transformation are reaction shots of a diverse judging panel and a shocked audience, capturing expressions of disbelief, fear, and amazement.

cinematography.cameraShot: A mix of medium-long shots on the stage and close-up reaction shots of judges and audience members. The camera is static during the transformations to emphasize the surreal effect.

actions: The elderly couple bows slightly toward the audience.
The man bends down and morphs into a realistic, large-maned lion.
The lion roars at the camera, showing its teeth.
The elderly woman walks a few steps and then crouches down.
As she crouches, she transforms into a grey and white wolf.
The lion and the wolf sit together on stage, looking towards the audience.
Judges and audience members cover their mouths, scream, and wide-eye the performance in disbelief.
dialogue: Upbeat, rhythmic Portuguese pop music with lyrics: 'Vou te hipnotizar com a bunda da vovó...'
Audience cheering and gasps of shock.
